steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The opening warns that introducing new species “can often be harmful,”—but the evidence shows hwameis actively spread seeds of endangered native plants, creating a direct reversal of that initial concern.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C fits directly: “rather than harming” acknowledges the initial concern, while “provide an important benefit” matches the evidence that hwameis spread seeds of endangered plants. The other three choices either hedge without a clear position, assert unsupported initial damage, or address an irrelevant distinction about fruit types.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
